svg.font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: ESP32-DevKitC V4 · WS2812B strip · 330 Ω on data · 1000 µF across 5V/GND · no soldering
JST pigtail end · only first 16 LEDs used
Cap 1000 µF sits across the rails near the strip;
stripe (−) to GND. Clip the U.FL antenna before power-on.
